diffs.diff:
--- a/predict.py
+++ b/predict.py
@@ -56,7 +56,6 @@
 

     model = SegmentationModel(num_classes=meta['num_classes'], pretrained=False)

     state = torch.load(args.checkpoint, map_location='cpu')

-    # Handle both DDP (module. prefix) and non-DDP checkpoints

     new_state = {}

     for k, v in state.items():

         new_key = k[7:] if k.startswith('module.') else k

@@ -81,8 +80,16 @@
             with torch.cuda.amp.autocast():

                 logits = model(imgs)

             preds = logits.argmax(dim=1).cpu().numpy().astype(np.uint8)

+

+            # default_collate turns list of same-shape tuples into tuple of tensors

+            if isinstance(orig_sizes, (tuple, list)) and len(orig_sizes) == 2 and isinstance(orig_sizes[0], torch.Tensor):

+                widths = orig_sizes[0].tolist()

+                heights = orig_sizes[1].tolist()

+                orig_sizes = list(zip(widths, heights))

+

             for pred, img_id, orig_size in zip(preds, img_ids, orig_sizes):

                 w, h = orig_size

+                w, h = int(w), int(h)

                 pred_img = Image.fromarray(pred)

                 pred_img = pred_img.resize((w, h), Image.NEAREST)

                 pred_img.save(os.path.join(out_dir, img_id + '.png'))
